text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I lost again! My comeback was unsuccessful,
ineffectual—a total bust...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I know I shouldn't be saying things like that, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm pathetic... I failed to spread my wings yet
again...
choice_data_list: You should take it easy for once.
Get up, El! Stand up tall!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? What do you mean? How can I take it easy
at a time like this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road of a champion is full of thorns and
spikes. Getting through it with force alone will
make you burn out midway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why taking time to rest and reflect on how
you brave that road is essential.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see. Just giving it my all isn't gonna cut it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Good thinking! I'm starting to feel like I can win
next time!
choice_data_list: Let's take things slow and steady!
Let's take things slow and steady!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I'm gonna go the distance on my victory road!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí. No matter how many times I fall, I'll keep
gettin' back up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: After all, I'm... the Phantom Bird!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And this Phantom Bird is immortal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Claro! This time, I'm takin' on the world!
